title: Text-Analysis
text: development version GitHub :

title: Text-Analysis
text: Launch browse TextAnalysisR app:

title: Text-Analysis
text: Preprocess text data using preprocess_texts function:
code: data <- TextAnalysisR::SpecialEduTech   # Preprocess text data preprocessed_data <- preprocess_texts(data, text_field = "united_texts")

title: Text-Analysis
text: Use plot_word_frequency function plot word frequency results:
code: # data is a document-feature matrix (dfm) object through the quanteda package.  # Plot word frequency for the top 20 terms word_freq_plot <- plot_word_frequency(data, n = 20) print(word_freq_plot)

title: Text-Analysis
text: Use extract_frequent_word function extract frequently observed top words:
code: # data is a document-feature matrix (dfm) object through the quanteda package.  # Extract the top 20 frequent words top_words <- extract_frequent_word(data, n = 20) print(top_words)

title: Text-Analysis
text: Use plot_topic_term function visualize topic-term probabilities:
code: # data is a tidy data frame that includes term (word)-topic probabilities.  # Plot topic-term probabilities for the top 10 terms topic_term_plot <- plot_topic_term(data, top_n = 10) print(topic_term_plot)

title: Text-Analysis
text: Use examine_top_terms function examine highest word probabilities topic:
code: # data is a tidy data frame that includes term (word)-topic probabilities.  # Examine the top 5 terms with the highest term-topic probabilities top_terms <- examine_top_terms(data, top_n = 5) print(top_terms)

title: Text-Analysis
text: Visualize document-topic probabilities using plot_topic_probability function:
code: # data is a tidy data frame that includes document-topic probabilities.  # Plot document-topic probabilities for the top 15 topics topic_prob_plot <- plot_topic_probability(data, top_n = 15) print(topic_prob_plot)

title: Text-Analysis
text: Create table document-topic probabilities using plot_topic_probability_table function:
code: # data is a tidy data frame that includes document-topic probabilities.  # Create a table of document-topic probabilities for the top 15 topics topic_prob_table <- plot_topic_probability_table(gamma_td, top_n = 15) print(topic_prob_table)

what: TextAnalysisR: Text Mining Workflow Tools — TextAnalysisR-package
title: TextAnalysisR: Text Mining Workflow Tools — TextAnalysisR-package
text: 'TextAnalysisR' provides supporting workflow text mining analysis. web app incorporates 'quanteda' (text preprocessing), 'stm' (structural topic modeling), 'ggraph' well 'widyr' (network analysis). 'tidytext' implemented tidy non-tidy format objects.

title: TextAnalysisR: Text Mining Workflow Tools — TextAnalysisR-package
text: Maintainer: Mikyung Shin shin.mikyung@gmail.com (ORCID)

code: if(requireNamespace("quanteda", "tidytext")){ dfm <- SpecialEduTech %>% preprocess_texts(text_field = "abstract") %>% quanteda::dfm() data <- tidytext::tidy(stm_15, document_names = rownames(dfm), log = FALSE) data %>% examine_top_terms(top_n = 5) } #> Warning: NA is replaced by empty string #> Creating a tokens object from a tokens input... #>  ...splitting hyphens #> Warning: split_tags argument is not used #>  ...removing separators, punctuation, symbols, numbers, URLs  #>  ...complete, elapsed time: 0.078 seconds. #> Finished constructing tokens from 490 documents. #> removed 114 features #>  #> kept 4,691 features #>  #> #
